race.comment: Plenty of talent in this but hard to go past YULE POINT (4) who not only won her maiden last time but by an absolute space. Has more upside and fitness on a few of the rivals is the one to beat again. CAVERN (1) comes to the NT off a freshen and is a former Victorian who has the ability to go close in this easier class. Was fifth on the Pakenham synthetic last time. VORONYA (2) had two runs for the new yard in Alice Springs before a break and won both. Can return with a big run. SNAPPY SWEETHEART (3) is a progressive filly who won here before a break. Off the scene for a long time but has won 2/3 course and distance and the ability to run well fresh. OUR SQUAMOSA (7) can measure up on best figures and can improve.
